steps: Reproduce or locate the bug based on the description.
Identify the root cause by tracing the relevant code paths.
Implement the fix with minimal changes to affected code.
Add a regression test that would have caught this bug.
Run the full test suite to ensure no regressions.
Commit with a message that references the bug and explains the fix.
extra_instructions: Focus on the root cause, not symptoms. If the fix requires changes in multiple files, explain the relationship between changes in the commit message.
